prompt: File my 'Renew library card' to-do under my Errands area.
paraphrases: Move the library-card renewal task into Errands.
That 'Renew library card' item sitting in my inbox belongs in my Errands area — put it there.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMArea a ON t.area=a.uuid WHERE t.title='Renew library card' AND a.title='Errands' AND t.trashed=0 AND t.status=0 AND t.start=0

pseudoScript: things todo move "$(things inbox --json | jq -r '.data[]|select(.title=="Renew library card")|.uuid')" --area Errands
